assumptions: No Hugging Face account, User Access Token, or Inference Providers request is assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

developer_goal: Create a Hugging Face account and fine-grained token, confirm usable Inference Providers credits, and receive a chat completions JSON result over HTTPS.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions returns model message JSON.
first_success.observable_signal: The chat completions response includes choices with assistant message content for the requested prompt.

route_selection.surface: Inference Providers chat completions via cURL (HF token + monthly credits)
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Inference Providers chat completions via cURL (HF token + monthly credits)

candidates.name: Inference Providers chat completions via cURL (HF token + monthly credits)
candidates.reason: Hugging Face Inference Providers docs document direct HTTP/cURL to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions with Authorization: Bearer $HF_TOKEN. Pricing docs state every user receives monthly credits for routed requests, and pay-as-you-go credit purchase is required after free monthly credits are exhausted. An SDK install is not required.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Hugging Face account.
required_path.observable_result: Token settings and billing settings are reachable.

required_path.action: Confirm usable Inference Providers monthly credits, or add a payment method and purchase credits if monthly credits are exhausted.
required_path.observable_result: Billing shows remaining monthly credits or purchased credits for Inference Providers.

required_path.action: Create a fine-grained token with Make calls to Inference Providers and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The token is generated and available locally.
The environment variable is set for the current shell.

required_path.action: POST a chat completions request with cURL to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions.
required_path.observable_result: The API returns successful JSON with assistant message content.

required_path.action: Confirm the chat completions JSON includes the model message content.
required_path.observable_result: Assistant message content is present in choices.

prerequisites.description: A Hugging Face account that can open token settings and billing.

Usable Inference Providers credits for HF-routed requests. Free users receive monthly credits ($0.10 subject to change); after exhaustion, purchase additional credits (payment method via billing settings) for pay-as-you-go.
A fine-grained User Access Token with Make calls to Inference Providers permission.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

sources.title: Inference Providers
evidence_supported: Fine-grained token with Inference Providers permission

sources.title: Pricing and Billing
evidence_supported: Credit purchase required after monthly credits for continued usage

sources.title: Billing
evidence_supported: Credits cover Inference Providers among other compute services

uncertainties.question: Whether every brand-new Free account still has non-zero monthly Inference Providers credits at signup versus needing an immediate credit purchase.
uncertainties.impact: Billing purchase may precede or follow the first successful chat completions call.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Pricing states monthly credits exist but eligibility timing for brand-new accounts is not fully enumerated on these pages.
